a_noindex_16_to_70.likely_source: Phase 12-14 V2 cleanup — ~2,000 formula scenario pages were noindexed. Google is now reporting these in the Pages dashboard.
a_noindex_16_to_70.verification_method: Check GSC Pages drilldown for noindex group. Extract URLs. Verify they are formula/tool variants, not important calculators/guides/decisions.
a_noindex_16_to_70.risk_if_unintentional: LOW — even if some are real pages, noindex is easily reversible
a_noindex_16_to_70.action: Audit URLs in next cycle. Hold cleanup test until verified.

b_crawled_not_indexed_5_to_15.likely_candidates: Tool/scenario duplicate pages that Google crawled but deemed low quality
b_crawled_not_indexed_5_to_15.action: Extract 15 URLs via GSC Pages drilldown. Classify by type. If all are thin dupes → no action (expected). If real content pages → improve content and request indexing.

c_404_5_to_7.action: Identify 2 new 404 URLs. Check if broken internal links or deleted pages. Fix or 410.
